query:
SELECT
            id as "id: CommitteeSessionId",
            number as "number: u32",
            election_id as "election_id: ElectionId",
            status as "status: _",
            location,
            start_date_time as "start_date_time: _"
        FROM (
            SELECT
            id,
            number,
            election_id,
            status,
            location,
            start_date_time,
            row_number() over (
            PARTITION BY election_id
            ORDER BY number DESC
            ) AS row_number FROM committee_sessions
        ) t WHERE t.row_number = 1
